title: Minimum Index Sum of Common Elements
titleCn: 公共元素的最小索引和

detail.title: Minimum Index Sum of Common Elements
hints: Build a hash map pos1 that stores, for each value in nums1, the smallest index where it appears.
Iterate through nums2. For each index j, if nums2[j] exists in pos1, compute pos1[nums2[j]] + j.
Track the minimum index sum across all such matches.
If no common element is found, return -1.
